nodes.question: Who is the LIM (Launch Innovation Manager) on the project?
What country will this product be sold in United States, Canada, Latin America, Europe, “Asia-Pacific, Middle East, Africa” (AMEA), or UNSURE?
Are you creating a new Case, Display, WIP (Work in Process), or UNSURE?”
Is this a Shipper or Mod display type?
Is this MOD a full, half, or quarter?
Is this MOD made with full cases or trays?
Will this be sold at club stores, traditional retailers, an e-commerce retailer, or RX DTC (Direct to Consumer)?
Will this item need a new Club Package UPC or use an existing Club Package UPC?
Will the customer be required to order the item as a full unit load, or can it be purchased at the case level?
Is this a straight case, a bulk case, or a single serve tray?
Will this item need a new Package UPC or use an existing Package UPC?
Does the item have pouches?
Does the package inside the case have a printed UPC?
Will this item need a new Package UPC or use an existing Package UPC?
Will this item need a new Package UPC or use an existing Package UPC?
Will the items be packed into a Brown Corrugate Box or Printed Box?
Is this a Case or Tote/Kone of product?
Will this be sold at club stores or traditional retailers?
Is this item built by VAS?
Is this a straight case, or a bulk case?
Will this item need a new Package UPC or use an existing Package UPC?
Does the item have pouches?
Is this a Pringles product?
Is this an RX Product?
What type of Project: PDR, PWR, SCR, or KUBIC?
Enter Project Name (only letters, numbers, spaces, and dash allowed)
Enter a numeric Project Number (only numbers and dash allowed)
Select the category.
Enter a brief product description (max 40 chars)
Enter a brief project overview and technical notes
What stated weight will this be applicable for: PACKAGE or INNER ITEM/POUCH?
What is the status of the stated weight: ESTIMATED or FINALIZED?
What is the stated net weight?
What is the unit of measure of the stated net weight: OZ, LB, G, or KG?
What is the status of the case count: ESTIMATED or FINALIZED?
What is the case count?
What is a SKU number that can be a reference material for this new product? (Optional unless Project Type is KUBIC. Please use "none" or "blank" otherwise.)
Is this product approved to sell via Ecommerce?
Is this product designated to one customer?
Select the customer's name
Should the customer's name be included in the material description?
Is the DTC product a variety pack (usually NO)?
Is the product a variety pack?
Will the variety pack components have UPC codes?
Is this item owned by Away From Home?
Is this an Export Product?
Build the item using Existing EXPORT UPCs?
List the Existing EXPORT UPC codes
Will the product have a private label?
What is the private label name associated to the product?
Build the item using Existing PRIVATE LABEL UPCs?
List the Existing PRIVATE LABEL UPC codes
Should the product's information be sent through GDSN to the customer (DATASYNC)? (usually YES)
Is this product a NON Sellable FERT (FALB)?
What is the Material Prefix Description?
Is a compressed UPC required for any of the components: NO, POUCH, PACKAGE, or BOTH?
What is the Existing Package UPC Code?
What is the K number for the Existing Package?
What is the Existing POUCH UPC Code?
What is the K number for the Existing POUCH?
List any other Existing UPC codes to be used not already mentioned (Please use "none" or "blank" otherwise.)
Indicate IF the EXISTING Pouch or Package (or both) are compressed: NO, POUCH, PACKAGE, or BOTH
Might Sale Samples be needed?
List any other EXISTING K numbers to be used not already mentioned (Please use "none" or "blank" otherwise.)
Select all special packaging requirements needed for launch.
If unsure what to select, please review the Training section or reach out to the Supply Chain Data Governance team at scdatagov@kellanova.com.  Step-by-Step process has ended.

edges.raw: Capture "LIM" (1006). Go to BUSN_AREA_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
"Business Area" (1305) is <'KELLANOVA'>. Go to PROD_COUNTRY_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
IF ('Latin America' or 'LA' or 'Mexico' or 'MX') is selected then "Product Country" (1008) is <'LA - Latin America'>.  Go to NOT_CA_FORM_TYPE_Q. END.
ELSE IF ('Europe' or 'EU') is selected then "Product Country" (1008) is <'EU - Europe'>.  Go to NOT_CA_FORM_TYPE_Q.  END.

ELSE IF ('Asia-Pacific' or 'AP' or 'Middle East' or 'ME' or ' Africa' or 'AMEA') is selected then "Product Country" (1008) is <'AMEA - Asia-Pacific, Middle East, Africa'>.  Go to NOT_CA_FORM_TYPE_Q.  END.
ELSE IF ('United States' or 'US' or 'USA') is selected then "Product Country" (1008) is <'US - United States'>.  Go to NOT_CA_FORM_TYPE_Q.  END.
ELSE IF ('Canada' or 'CA') is selected then "Product Country" (1008) is <'CA - Canada'> and "Form Type" (1007) is <'CASE'>. Go to CA_Q. END.
ELSE IF 'UNSURE' is selected then Go to UNSURE_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'DISPLAY' is selected then "Form Type" (1007) is <'DISPLAY'>.  Go to DISPLAY_Q.   END.
ELSE IF 'CASE' is selected then "Form Type" (1007) is <'CASE'>. Go to CASE_Q.   END.
ELSE IF 'WIP' is selected then "Form Type" (1007) is <'WIP'>. Go to WIP_Q. END.
ELSE IF 'UNSURE' is selected then Go to UNSURE_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'SHIPPER' is selected then ("Product Type" (1009) is <'SHIPPER'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'<not required>'>). Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q.   END.
ELSE IF 'MOD' is selected then Go to MOD_TYPE_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'QUARTER' is selected then ("Product Type" (1009) is <'Qtr Mod'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'<not required>'>).  Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q.  END.
ELSE IF 'HALF' is selected then ("Product Type" (1009) is <'Half Mod'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'<not required>'>). Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q.  END.
ELSE IF 'FULL' is selected then Go to FULL_MOD_Q.   END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'full cases' is selected then ("Product Type" (1009) is <'Rainbow Mod'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'<not required>'>).  Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END.
ELSE IF 'trays' is selected then ("Product Type" (1009) is <'Full Mod'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'<not required>'>). Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'CLUB' is selected then Go to CLUB_Q.  END.
ELSE IF 'TRADITIONAL' is selected then Go to TRADITIONAL_Q.  END.
ELSE IF 'E-COMMERCE' is selected then Go to ECOMM_Q.  END.
ELSE IF 'RX DTC' is selected then Go to RX_DTC_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'EXISTING' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Club Repack/RCP'>. Go to NEW_CLUB_Q. END.
ELSE IF 'NEW' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Club'>. Go to NEW_CLUB_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF ('full' or 'unit load') is selected then "product subtype" (1010) is <'Traditional 1PKG=1CS'>. Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END.
ELSE IF 'case' is selected then "product subtype" (1010) is <'Non-Traditional'>. Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF ‘straight case’ is selected then Go to STRAIGHT_Q.  END.
ELSE IF ‘bulk case’ is selected then Go to BULK_Q.  END.
ELSE IF (‘single serve’ or 'SS') is selected then Go to SINGLE_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'EXISTING' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Straight Case Repack/RCP'>. Go to STR_SUBTYPE_Q. END.
ELSE IF 'NEW' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Straight Case'>. Go to STR_SUBTYPE_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'YES' is selected then "product subtype" (1010) is <'Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs'>. Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END.
ELSE IF 'NO' is selected then "product subtype" (1010) is <'Package with UPC'>. Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'YES' is selected then Go to BULK_PRINT_Q.   END.
ELSE IF 'NO' is selected then ("Product Type" (1009) is <'Bulk Case'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'No Package UPC'>). Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'NEW' is selected then ("Product Type" (1009) is <'Bulk Case'> and "product subtype"  (1010) is <'Package with UPC'>). Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END.
ELSE IF 'EXISTING' is selected then ("Product Type" (1009) is <'Bulk Repack/RCP'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'Package with UPC'>). Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'NEW' is selected then ("Product Type" (1009) is <'Single Serve'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'With Tray'>). Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END.
ELSE IF 'EXISTING' is selected then ("Product Type" (1009) is <'Single Serve Repack/RCP'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'With Tray'>). Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF (‘Brown’ or ‘Corrugate’) is selected then ("Product Type" (1009) is <'ECOMM'> and "Product Subtype" (1010) is <'CASE (Brown Box)'>).  Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END.
ELSE IF ‘Printed’ is selected then ("Product Type" (1009) is <'ECOMM'> and "Product Subtype" (1010) is <'CASE (Printed Box)'>). Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF ‘RX DTC’ is selected then ("Product Type" (1009) is <‘DTC Bundle’> and "Product Subtype" (1010) is <'Static (Pre-Determined Mix of Products)'>). Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'Case' is selected then ("Product Type" (1009) is <'WIP Case'> and "Product Subtype" (1010) is <'<not required>'>). Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END.
ELSE IF ('Tote' or 'Kone') is selected then ("Product Type" (1009) is <'WIP Tote'> and "Product Subtype" (1010) is <'<not required>'>). Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'Club' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Canada Club'>. Go to CA_CLUB_Q.  END.
ELSE IF 'traditional retailer' is selected then Go to CA_TRADITIONAL_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF ‘yes’ is selected then "product subtype" (1010) is <'Unit Load'>. Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END.
ELSE IF ‘no’ is selected then "product subtype" (1010) is <'Traditional 1PKG=1CS'>. Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'straight case' is selected then Go to CA_STRAIGHT_Q.  END.
ELSE IF 'bulk case' is selected then ("Product Type" (1009) is <'Canada Bulk Case'> and "Product Subtype" (1010) is <'<not required>'>). Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'NEW' is selected then "Product Type" is <'Canada Straight Case'>. Go to CA_STR_SUBTYPE_Q. END.
ELSE IF 'EXISTING' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Canada Straight Case Repack/RCP - existing PKG UPC'>. Go to CA_STR_SUBTYPE_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF ‘yes’ is selected then "product subtype" (1010) is <'Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs'>. Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END.
ELSE IF ‘no’ is selected then "product subtype" (1010) is <'Package with UPC'>. Go to FINISH_COUNTRY_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
Remind the user that this is a good time to save their progress by clicking the Save Progress button. Go to PRINGLES_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Is this a Pringles product" (1011), either <'Yes'> or <'No'>. Go to RX_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Is this an RX product" (1012), either <'Yes'> or <'No'>. Go to SAP_MATL_NUM_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
"SAP Material Number" (1013) is <'<not required>'>. Go to PROJECT_TYPE_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'PDR' is selected then Go to PROJECT_NAME_Q. END.
ELSE IF 'PWR' is selected then Go to PWR_Q. END.
ELSE IF 'SCR' is selected then Go to PROJECT_NAME_Q. END.
ELSE IF 'KUBIC' is selected then Go to PROJECT_NAME_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Project Name or Number" (1015) field (must be alphanumeric and can include a dash and can include spaces) <FREEFORM>. Go to FINISH_PROJ_TYPE_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Project Name or Number" (1015) field (must be numeric, can include a dash) <FREEFORM>. Go to FINISH_PROJ_TYPE_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Go to SET_CATEGORY_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Set Category" (1016). Go to BRIEF_PROD_DESC_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Brief Product Description" (1017) of maximum 40 characters (must be alphanumeric and can include dashes and can include spaces) <FREEFORM>. Go to BRIEF_PROJ_OVRVW_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Brief Project Overview and Technical Notes" (1018) <FREEFORM>. Go to ST_WGT_APP_FOR_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Stated Weight Applicable For" (1019), either <'PACKAGE'> or <'INNER ITEM/POUCH'>. Go to ST_WGT_STATUS_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Stated Weight Status" (1020), either <'ESTIMATED'> or <'FINALIZED'>. Go to ST_NET_WGT_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Stated Net Weight" (1021) (must be numeric) <FREEFORM>. Go to ST_NET_WGT_UOM_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Stated Net Weight UOM" (1022), either <'OZ'>, <'LB'>, <'G'>, or <'KG'>. Go to CASE_CT_STATUS_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Case Count Status" (1023), either <'ESTIMATED'> or <'FINALIZED'>. Go to CASE_CT_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Case Count" (1024) (must be numeric) <FREEFORM>. Go to LIKE_SKU_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
IF "Like SKU / Reference Material Number" (1025) is numeric, then Go to DECISION_ECOMM_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Project Type" (1014) is 'KUBIC' and "Like SKU / Reference Material Number" (1025) is 'none') then Go to LIKE_SKU_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Project Type" (1014) is 'KUBIC' and "Like SKU / Reference Material Number" (1025) is 'blank') then Go to LIKE_SKU_Q. END.
ELSE IF ('none' or 'blank') is selected then "Like SKU / Reference Material Number" (1025) is <'<not required>'>. Go to DECISION_ECOMM_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF "Product Type" (1009) is 'ECOMM' then "Approved to sell via Ecommerce" (1026) is <'YES'>. Go to ONE_CUSTOMER_Q. END.
ELSE IF "Product Type" (1009) is 'DTC Bundle' then "Approved to sell via Ecommerce" (1026) is <'YES'>. Go to ONE_CUSTOMER_Q. END.
ELSE IF "Product Country" (1008) is 'CA - CANADA' then "Approved to sell via Ecommerce" (1026) is <'NO'>. Go to ONE_CUSTOMER_Q.  END.
ELSE IF "Form Type" (1007) is 'WIP' then ("Approved to sell via Ecommerce" (1026) is <'NO'> and "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'NO'>). Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q. END.
ELSE IF "Form Type" (1007) is 'CASE' then Go to SELL_ECOMM_Q. END.
ELSE IF "Form Type" (1007) is 'DISPLAY' then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'NO'>. Go to SELL_ECOMM_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
Go to ONE_CUSTOMER_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'YES' is selected then Go to ONE_CUST_NAME_Q.  END.
ELSE IF ('NO' is selected and "Form Type" (1007) is 'CASE') then Go to DECISION_VAR_PACK_Q.  END.
ELSE IF ('NO' is selected and "Form Type" (1007) is 'DISPLAY') then Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Designated Customer Name" (1028). Go to INCL_ONE_CUST_MATL_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
IF "Form Type" (1007) is 'DISPLAY' then Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q.  END.
ELSE IF "Form Type" (1007) is 'CASE' then Go to DECISION_VAR_PACK_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF ("Product Country" (1008) is 'CA - CANADA') then Go to CA_DECISION_VAR_PK_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Bulk Case Repack/RCP') then Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q.  END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Bulk Case') then ("Variety Pack" (1030) is <'NO'> and "Variety Pack components have UPC Codes" (1031) is <'NO'>). Go to BUILD_SKU_Q.  END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Club Repack/RCP') then ("Variety Pack" (1030) is <'NO'> and "Variety Pack components have UPC Codes" (1031) is <'NO'>). Go to BUILD_SKU_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Club' and "Product Subtype" (1010) is 'Non-Traditional') then Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q.  END.

ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Club' and "Product Subtype" (1010) is 'Traditional 1PKG=1CS') then ("Variety Pack" (1030) is <'NO'> and "Variety Pack components have UPC Codes" (1031) is <'NO'>). Go to BUILD_SKU_Q.  END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'DTC Bundle') then Go to DTC_VAR_PACK_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'ECOMM') then Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Single Serve Repack/RCP') then Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Single Serve') then Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case Repack/RCP') then Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q. END.

conditions: Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs
edges.raw: ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case' and "Product Subtype" (1010) is 'Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs') then ("Variety Pack" (1030) is <'NO'> and "Variety Pack components have UPC Codes" (1031) is <'NO'>). Go to BUILD_SKU_Q.  END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case' and "Product Subtype" (1010) is 'Package with UPC') then Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q.  END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Canada Bulk Case') then Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Canada Club') then ("Variety Pack" (1030) is <'NO'> and "Variety Pack components have UPC Codes" (1031) is <'NO'>). Go to BUILD_SKU_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Canada Straight Case') then Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q. END.

conditions: Canada Straight Case Repack/RCP - existing PKG UPC
edges.raw: ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Canada Straight Case Repack/RCP - existing PKG UPC') then Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'YES' is selected then Go to VP_COMP_UPC_Q.  END.
ELSE IF 'NO' is selected then Go to BUILD_SKU_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'YES' is selected then Go to VP_COMP_UPC_Q.  END.
ELSE IF 'NO' is selected then Go to BUILD_SKU_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Variety Pack components have UPC Codes" (1031), either <'Yes'> or <'No'>. Go to BUILD_SKU_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
IF ("Product Country" (1008) is 'CA - CANADA') then Go to CA_BUILD_SKU_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Bulk Case Repack/RCP') then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'YES'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Bulk Case') then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'NO'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Club Repack/RCP') then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'YES'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Club') then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'NO'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'DTC Bundle') then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'NO'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'ECOMM') then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'NO'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Single Serve Repack/RCP') then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'YES'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Single Serve') then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'NO'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case Repack/RCP') then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'YES'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case') then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'NO'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Canada Bulk Case') then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'NO'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Canada Club') then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'NO'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q. END.

conditions: Canada Straight Case Repack/RCP - existing PKG UPC
edges.raw: ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Canada Straight Case Repack/RCP - existing PKG UPC') then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'YES'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Canada Straight Case') then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'NO'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Is this item owned by Away From Home" (1033), either <'Yes'> or <'No'>. Go to EXPORT_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
IF "Form Type" (1007) is 'DISPLAY' then ("Build SKU Using Existing Export UPCs" (1035) is <'NO'> and "List Existing Export UPC Codes" (1036) is <'<not required>'>). Go to DATASYNC_Q.  END.
ELSE IF 'YES' is selected then Go to BUILD_SKU_EXPORT_Q.  END.
ELSE IF 'NO' is selected then ("Build SKU Using Existing Export UPCs" (1035) is <'NO'> and "List Existing Export UPC Codes" (1036) is <'<not required>'>). Go to PRIV_LABEL_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'YES' is selected then Go to LIST_EXPORT_UPC_Q.  END.
ELSE IF 'NO' is selected then Go to PRIV_LABEL_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "List Existing Export UPC Codes" (1036) <FREEFORM>. Go to PRIV_LABEL_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'YES' is selected then Go to PRIV_LABEL_NAME_Q.  END.
ELSE IF 'NO' is selected then Go to DATASYNC_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Private Label Name" (1038). Go to BUILD_SKU_PRIV_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
IF 'YES' is selected then Go to LIST_PRIV_UPC_Q.  END.
ELSE IF 'NO' is selected then Go to DATASYNC_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "List Existing Private UPCs" (1040) <FREEFORM>. Go to DATASYNC_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Data Sync(GDSN)" (1041), either <'Yes'> or <'No'>. Go to FERT_WIP_FALB_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Is this Non Sellable FERT WIP" (1304), either <'Yes'> or <'No'>. Go to MATL_PREFIX_DESC_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Material Prefix Description" (1042). Go to COMPRESS_UPC_Q. END.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Is a Compressed UPC Required for the Components" (1043), either <'NO'>, <'POUCH'>, <'PACKAGE'>, or <'BOTH'>. Go to DECISION_EXIST_PRTD_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
IF ("Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is 'NO' and "Product Type" (1009) is 'Single Serve') then Go to POUCH_UPC_Q. END.

conditions: Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs
edges.raw: ELSE IF ("Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is 'NO' and "Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case' and "Product Subtype" (1010) is 'Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs') then Go to POUCH_UPC_Q.  END.

conditions: Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs
edges.raw: ELSE IF ("Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is 'NO' and "Product Type" (1009) is 'Canada Straight Case' and "Product Subtype" (1010) is 'Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs') then Go to POUCH_UPC_Q.  END.
ELSE IF ("Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is 'NO') then Go to FINISH_EXIST_PRTD_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is 'YES') then Go to PACKAGE_UPC_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Package UPC Code" (1044) <FREEFORM>. Go to PACKAGE_K_NUM_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Package K Number" (1045) <FREEFORM>. Go to DECISION_POUCH_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Single Serve Repack/RCP') then Go to POUCH_UPC_Q. END.

conditions: Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs
edges.raw: ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case Repack/RCP' and "Product Subtype" (1010) is 'Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs') then Go to POUCH_UPC_Q. END.

conditions: Canada Straight Case Repack/RCP - existing PKG UPC
Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs
edges.raw: ELSE IF ("Product Type" (1009) is 'Canada Straight Case Repack/RCP - existing PKG UPC' and "Product Subtype" (1010) is 'Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs') then Go to POUCH_UPC_Q. END.
ELSE Go to LIST_UPC_CODES_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Pouch UPC Code" (1046) <FREEFORM> then Go to POUCH_K_NUM_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Pouch K Number" (1047) <FREEFORM> then Go to DECISION_UPC_CODES_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
IF ("Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is 'NO' and "Product Type" (1009) is 'Single Serve') then Go to FINISH_EXIST_PRTD_Q. END.

conditions: Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs
edges.raw: ELSE IF ("Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is 'NO' and "Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case' and "Product Subtype" (1010) is 'Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs') then Go to FINISH_EXIST_PRTD_Q.  END.

conditions: Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs
edges.raw: ELSE IF ("Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is 'NO' and "Product Type" (1009) is 'Canada Straight Case' and "Product Subtype" (1010) is 'Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs') then Go to FINISH_EXIST_PRTD_Q.  END.
ELSE Go to LIST_UPC_CODES_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
Go to COMP_UPC_EXIST_Q. END.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Compressed UPC Existing" (1049), either <'NO'>, <'POUCH'>, <'PACKAGE'>, or <'BOTH'>. Go to FINISH_EXIST_PRTD_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
IF ("Product Country" (1008) is 'CA - Canada') then Go to LIST_EXIST_K_NUM_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Country" (1008) is 'LA - Latin America') then Go to LIST_EXIST_K_NUM_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Country" (1008) is 'EU - Europe') then Go to LIST_EXIST_K_NUM_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Country" (1008) is 'AMEA - Asia-Pacific, Middle East, Africa') then Go to LIST_EXIST_K_NUM_Q. END.
ELSE IF ("Product Country" (1008) is 'US - United States' and "Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case') then Go to SALES_SAMPLE_Q. END.
ELSE Go to LIST_EXIST_K_NUM_Q. END IF.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Sale Samples may be needed" (1050), either <'Yes'> or <'No'>. Go to LIST_EXIST_K_NUM_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Go to ADDTNL_PKG_LAUNCH_Q. END.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Additional Packaging for Launch" (1053). Multiple selections possible. Go to FINISH_REQ_INITIATE_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Go to FINISH_REQ_INITIATE_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
